overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside an elevated train traveling through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at dusk. The journey transitions from industrial outskirts with smokestacks through a massive architectural archway into dense neon-lit commercial districts filled with holographic advertisements and digital billboards.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a modern train cabin with digital advertising screens and gray seating. The train accelerates out of a station into an industrial area with tall smokestacks emitting dark plumes, then enters a brief dark tunnel section.

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the tunnel into an open industrial zone with electrical transmission towers and warning light systems. The camera approaches a massive architectural archway in the distance while passing red chevron warning signs along the elevated tracks.

segments.scene_description: The train passes through the massive archway gateway, transitioning from industrial outskirts to a dense commercial district. Green-lit glass towers rise on the left while holographic advertisements including a prominent REAL WATER billboard appear on the right.

segments.scene_description: The train moves through a narrow urban canyon lined with green neon-lit glass towers and dense holographic advertising. A large chromatic billboard passes by on the right before the train arrives at an elevated station featuring palm trees and an open platform area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense advertising canyon with public safety holograms

passing Night City Police Department billboard with police cruiser image

vertical signage for El Guapo with distinctive branding

segments.scene_description: Departing the station, the train enters the densest commercial section where walls of holographic advertisements and digital billboards line both sides of the track. A prominent Night City Police Department billboard appears on the left, followed by the El Guapo sign, as the train continues through the neon canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a sterile train interior through a bleak industrial wasteland into a vibrant, neon-drenched cyberpunk metropolis. It begins inside a modern cabin with digital screens as the train accelerates past towering smokestacks and plunges briefly into a dark tunnel. As the train emerges, the landscape opens into an industrial zone of transmission towers and warning signs before the camera glides through a massive architectural archway that serves as a gateway to the city. The scene then shifts into a dense urban canyon where green-lit glass towers and holographic advertisements, including a prominent REAL WATER billboard, replace the industrial gray. Finally, after a brief stop at an elevated station with palm trees, the train pushes deeper into the commercial heart of the city, flanked by walls of digital billboards and signs for the Night City Police Department and El Guapo.
